# Technicians API

Manage technician profiles, skills, and availability.

## Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/technicians` | List all technicians |
| POST | `/api/technicians` | Create a technician |
| GET | `/api/technicians/:id` | Get technician details |
| PUT | `/api/technicians/:id` | Update a technician |
| DELETE | `/api/technicians/:id` | Delete a technician |

## Team Members

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/team-members` | List all team members |
| POST | `/api/team-members` | Add team member |
| GET | `/api/team-members/:id` | Get team member details |
| PUT | `/api/team-members/:id` | Update team member |
| DELETE | `/api/team-members/:id` | Remove team member |
